title: Terms of Service
content:
## NOOWE Terms of Service

**Last updated: March 25, 2026**

Welcome to NOOWE! These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the NOOWE platform, including our mobile applications and related services.

### 1. Acceptance of Terms

By creating an account or using our services, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.

### 2. Description of Service

NOOWE is a restaurant management platform that offers:
- Placing orders at restaurants
- Table reservations
- Digital payments
- Loyalty programs
- Waitlist management
- Digital tab system
- Reviews and ratings

### 3. Account Registration

**3.1** You must be at least 18 years old to create an account.
**3.2** Information provided must be truthful and up to date.
**3.3** You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account.
**3.4** Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

### 4. Orders and Payments

**4.1** Displayed prices may or may not include service charges, as indicated.
**4.2** By confirming an order, you commit to making the payment.
**4.3** Cancellations are subject to each restaurant's policy.
**4.4** We process payments through secure third-party providers.
**4.5** Tips are optional and directed entirely to staff members.

### 5. Reservations

**5.1** Reservations are subject to restaurant availability.
**5.2** Cancellations must respect the minimum notice period set by the restaurant.
**5.3** Repeated no-shows may result in account restrictions.

### 6. Loyalty Program

**6.1** Accumulated points have no monetary value.
**6.2** Earning and redemption rules are defined by each restaurant.
**6.3** Points may expire according to program rules.
**6.4** NOOWE reserves the right to modify program rules.

### 7. User Conduct

You agree not to:
- Provide false information
- Use the platform for illegal activities
- Harass other users or staff
- Manipulate reviews or ratings
- Attempt to access restricted areas of the system
- Use bots or automated scripts

### 8. Reviews and Ratings

**8.1** Reviews should reflect genuine experiences.
**8.2** Offensive, defamatory, or false content will be removed.
**8.3** NOOWE may moderate content published on the platform.

### 9. Intellectual Property

**9.1** The NOOWE brand, logos, and content are our property.
**9.2** You may not reproduce or distribute our content without authorization.

### 10. Limitation of Liability

**10.1** NOOWE acts as an intermediary between customers and restaurants.
**10.2** We are not responsible for the quality of food or restaurant services.
**10.3** We do not guarantee uninterrupted platform availability.

### 11. Termination

**11.1** You may close your account at any time.
**11.2** We may suspend or close accounts that violate these Terms.
**11.3** Data will be handled according to our Privacy Policy.

### 12. Changes to Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. Significant changes will be communicated with 30 days notice.

### 13. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil.

### 14. Contact

For questions about these Terms:
- **General Support**: help@noowebr.com
- **Privacy / DPO**: dpo@noowebr.com
- **Security Incidents**: security@noowebr.com
- **Accessibility**: accessibility@noowebr.com
- **Legal Affairs**: legal@noowebr.com
- Address: Av. Paulista, 1000 - Sao Paulo, SP - Brazil
